concerns.text: FR-010 (Power justification) mapped to Phase 3: Analysis/code/analysis.py, but data-model.md's AnalysisResult entity lacks power/sample-size fields. Either add power analysis output to data model or clarify where this justification is recorded.

Contract schema includes material_id and thermal_conductivity (PerovskiteEntry fields) but AnalysisResult entity in data-model.md does not define these. Contract should either be renamed to reflect combined output or data model should include these fields in AnalysisResult.

Research states 'NO verified source in block (Must verify mp.org API)' for thermal conductivity data, but spec.md and plan.md both reference 'curated literature datasets (e.g., NIST)'. Plan only mentions Materials Project API for ingestion. Clarify whether NIST/literature merge is required or if MP thermal endpoint suffices.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires verification BEFORE research_accepted gate. Research.md explicitly states sources are NOT verified yet. This is a constitutional gate violation that must be resolved before research_accepted transition.
